evals.name: hebrew-tts-streaming-code
evals.prompt: Write Node.js code that streams Hebrew text-to-speech with ElevenLabs at good quality.

assertions.text: Selects a model whose Hebrew support is verified against live docs (not memory)
Does NOT recommend eleven_flash_v2_5 for Hebrew (not in its language list)
Respects the v3/WebSocket incompatibility: uses HTTP stream for eleven_v3
Cites the live doc page(s) used

evals.name: agents-mcp-routing
evals.prompt: How do I connect an MCP server to my ElevenLabs conversational agent?

assertions.text: Routes to ElevenAgents docs area (not generic API)
Fetches the MCP integration page live and answers from it
Mentions approval/security considerations surfaced by the docs

evals.name: openapi-schema-lookup
evals.prompt: What request body fields does the Create Agent endpoint accept?

assertions.text: Uses scripts/endpoint_schema.py instead of fetching the 1.4MB spec into context
Returns real field names taken from the live OpenAPI spec output
States the exact endpoint path and method from the spec
